title: Controversial spying law reignites infighting among House Republicans
shortDescription: A controversial spying law is highlighting tensions in the House GOP as conservatives and members of the intelligence community spar over reforms.

title: Vulnerable Republican senators embrace Donald Trump's abortion position
shortDescription: Amid a tough election year, Republicans are staking out positions on abortion that may be more palatable to the moderate voters they're courting.

title: No evidence Biden agreed to resign if he fails cognitive test | Fact check
shortDescription: There is no evidence Biden "consented" to a cognitive test and agreed to resign if he fails, as the post claims.

title: Biden campaign blames Trump after Arizona abortion ruling
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's campaign and the White House worked to blame Donald Trump after the Arizona Supreme Court upheld the state's abortion ban.

title: RFK Jr. campaign consultant says beating Biden is top priority in 2024
shortDescription: Rita Palma, a New York state campaign consultant for RFK Jr., appears in a video clip describing her strategy to beat Biden and possibly elect Trump.

title: 'Antisemitic tropes': Jewish groups criticize Donald Trump's comments
shortDescription: Donald Trump said Jewish voters who support Joe Biden this fall “should be spoken to” and accused Jewish and Black voters of backing Democrats “by habit.”

title: OnPolitics: Mayorkas impeachment moves to the Senate
shortDescription: Democrats are expected to try to dismiss the case against Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.

title: Trump loses bid to delay New York hush money trial over gag order
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump lost an emergency bid on Tuesday to delay his April 15 New York criminal hush money trial while he appeals a gag order.

title: Is the TikTok bill moving forward? Mitch McConnell calls on senators to act
shortDescription: A bill that passed in the House with overwhelming bipartisan support last month has been stalled in the Senate.

title: Donald Trump says states should decide abortion policy | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Trump loses his push to delay the Manhattan hush money trial pending a location change request and more top stories on USA TODAY's The Excerpt.

title: Donald Trump versus ... Lindsey Graham? GOP allies clash on abortion
shortDescription: Graham echoed other conservatives in criticizing Trump's announcement that states should decide abortion policy, not the federal government.

title: MTG makes case for ousting Mike Johnson, dialing up pressure
shortDescription: Marjorie Taylor Greene is making the case to her colleagues for ousting Mike Johnson, dialing up the pressure on the House speaker.

title: What to expect in Alejandro Mayorkas impeachment proceedings
shortDescription: The trial is likely to be dismissed in the Democratically-controlled Senate, but Republicans don't plan to make it easy.

title: Georgia DA Fani Willis fights Donald Trump's appeal to disqualify her
shortDescription: Fulton County DA Fani Willis argued she has no conflict of interest in Donald Trump's appeal to remove her from his election interference case.

title: Young people are reluctant to vote. They understand the consequences.
shortDescription: Polls show young people don't like either Trump or Biden and they're angry they're expected to pick one. Some young liberals may not vote at all.

title: Biden announces student loan relief plan
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said his administration plans to deliver interest relief to over 20 million borrowers who are "saddled with unsustainable debts."

title: Special counsel Jack Smith urges Supreme Court to reject Trump's immunity claim
shortDescription: Special counsel Jack Smith told the Supreme Court it must not delay Donald Trump's criminal trial even if it thinks presidents have some immunity.

title: Trump loses delay effort over trial location in NY hush money case
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump lost an emergency request to delay his April 15 Manhattan hush money trial as he tries to get the trial moved.
